parameters.specification/query:
// DAX Query
DEFINE
	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZE(
			'Report',
			'Report'[Shipment ID],
			'Report'[Direction],
			'Report'[Transport Mode],
			'Report'[Branch],
			'Report'[Region],
			'Report'[Shipper Name],
			'Report'[Carrier Name],
			'Report'[Carrier SCAC Code],
			'Report'[Carrier Booking Number],
			'Report'[Consol Number],
			'Report'[MBL Number],
			'Report'[MBL Type],
			'Report'[HBL Number],
			'Report'[HBL Type],
			'Report'[Shipment Status],
			'Report'[Cargo Type],
			'Report'[Consignee Name],
			'Report'[Consolidation Type],
			'Report'[Vessel Name / Voyage Number],
			'Report'[TrackingID],
			'Report'[Carrier DO Release Date],
			'Report'[Carrier Arrival Notice Received Date],
			'Report'[ATA],
			'Report'[ATD],
			'Report'[Shipment Received Date],
			'Report'[SI Status],
			'Report'[VGM Status],
			'Report'[Pre-Alert Status],
			'Report'[POL (Port of Loading)],
			'Report'[POD (Port of Discharge)],
			'Report'[HBL Draft Status],
			'Report'[HBL Amendment Reason],
			'Report'[HBL Amendment Occurred?],
			'Report'[Final HBL Status],
			'Report'[Final Destination],
			'Report'[Empty Container Return Status],
			'Report'[DPW Arrival Notice Status],
			'Report'[DO Status],
			'Report'[Custom's Filing Status],
			'Report'[CSO Member],
			'Report'[Created By],
			'Report'[Comments],
			'Report'[Actioned By],
			'Report'[Actioned],
			'Report'[Custom's Filing Date],
			'Report'[DPW Arrival Notice Date and Time],
			'Report'[DPW DO Release Date],
			'Report'[Empty Container Return Date],
			'Report'[ETA],
			'Report'[ETA at Final Destination],
			'Report'[ETD],
			'Report'[Final HBL Release Date],
			'Report'[Final MBL Release Date],
			'Report'[First HBL Draft Sent Data & Time],
			'Report'[HBL Amendment Date & Time],
			'Report'[LFD to Empty Return],
			'Report'[LFD to Pick Up],
			'Report'[Picked Up Date],
			'Report'[Port Cut-off Date & Time],
			'Report'[Pre-Alert Acceptance Date],
			'Report'[Pre-Alert Sent Date & Time],
			'Report'[VGM Submitted Date & time],
			'Report'[VGM Received Date & Time],
			'Report'[VGM Cut-off Date & Time],
			'Report'[SI Cut-off Date & Time],
			'Report'[SI Instructions Received Data & Time],
			'Report'[SI Submitted Date & Time]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			100000,
			__DS0Core,
			'Report'[Shipment ID],
			1,
			'Report'[Direction],
			1,
			'Report'[Transport Mode],
			1,
			'Report'[Branch],
			1,
			'Report'[Region],
			1,
			'Report'[Shipper Name],
			1,
			'Report'[Carrier Name],
			1,
			'Report'[Carrier SCAC Code],
			1,
			'Report'[Carrier Booking Number],
			1,
			'Report'[Consol Number],
			1,
			'Report'[MBL Number],
			1,
			'Report'[MBL Type],
			1,
			'Report'[HBL Number],
			1,
			'Report'[HBL Type],
			1,
			'Report'[Shipment Status],
			1,
			'Report'[Cargo Type],
			1,
			'Report'[Consignee Name],
			1,
			'Report'[Consolidation Type],
			1,
			'Report'[Vessel Name / Voyage Number],
			1,
			'Report'[TrackingID],
			1,
			'Report'[Carrier DO Release Date],
			1,
			'Report'[Carrier Arrival Notice Received Date],
			1,
			'Report'[ATA],
			1,
			'Report'[ATD],
			1,
			'Report'[Shipment Received Date],
			1,
			'Report'[SI Status],
			1,
			'Report'[VGM Status],
			1,
			'Report'[Pre-Alert Status],
			1,
			'Report'[POL (Port of Loading)],
			1,
			'Report'[POD (Port of Discharge)],
			1,
			'Report'[HBL Draft Status],
			1,
			'Report'[HBL Amendment Reason],
			1,
			'Report'[HBL Amendment Occurred?],
			1,
			'Report'[Final HBL Status],
			1,
			'Report'[Final Destination],
			1,
			'Report'[Empty Container Return Status],
			1,
			'Report'[DPW Arrival Notice Status],
			1,
			'Report'[DO Status],
			1,
			'Report'[Custom's Filing Status],
			1,
			'Report'[CSO Member],
			1,
			'Report'[Created By],
			1,
			'Report'[Comments],
			1,
			'Report'[Actioned By],
			1,
			'Report'[Actioned],
			1,
			'Report'[Custom's Filing Date],
			1,
			'Report'[DPW Arrival Notice Date and Time],
			1,
			'Report'[DPW DO Release Date],
			1,
			'Report'[Empty Container Return Date],
			1,
			'Report'[ETA],
			1,
			'Report'[ETA at Final Destination],
			1,
			'Report'[ETD],
			1,
			'Report'[Final HBL Release Date],
			1,
			'Report'[Final MBL Release Date],
			1,
			'Report'[First HBL Draft Sent Data & Time],
			1,
			'Report'[HBL Amendment Date & Time],
			1,
			'Report'[LFD to Empty Return],
			1,
			'Report'[LFD to Pick Up],
			1,
			'Report'[Picked Up Date],
			1,
			'Report'[Port Cut-off Date & Time],
			1,
			'Report'[Pre-Alert Acceptance Date],
			1,
			'Report'[Pre-Alert Sent Date & Time],
			1,
			'Report'[VGM Submitted Date & time],
			1,
			'Report'[VGM Received Date & Time],
			1,
			'Report'[VGM Cut-off Date & Time],
			1,
			'Report'[SI Cut-off Date & Time],
			1,
			'Report'[SI Instructions Received Data & Time],
			1,
			'Report'[SI Submitted Date & Time],
			1
		)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	'Report'[Shipment ID],
	'Report'[Direction],
	'Report'[Transport Mode],
	'Report'[Branch],
	'Report'[Region],
	'Report'[Shipper Name],
	'Report'[Carrier Name],
	'Report'[Carrier SCAC Code],
	'Report'[Carrier Booking Number],
	'Report'[Consol Number],
	'Report'[MBL Number],
	'Report'[MBL Type],
	'Report'[HBL Number],
	'Report'[HBL Type],
	'Report'[Shipment Status],
	'Report'[Cargo Type],
	'Report'[Consignee Name],
	'Report'[Consolidation Type],
	'Report'[Vessel Name / Voyage Number],
	'Report'[TrackingID],
	'Report'[Carrier DO Release Date],
	'Report'[Carrier Arrival Notice Received Date],
	'Report'[ATA],
	'Report'[ATD],
	'Report'[Shipment Received Date],
	'Report'[SI Status],
	'Report'[VGM Status],
	'Report'[Pre-Alert Status],
	'Report'[POL (Port of Loading)],
	'Report'[POD (Port of Discharge)],
	'Report'[HBL Draft Status],
	'Report'[HBL Amendment Reason],
	'Report'[HBL Amendment Occurred?],
	'Report'[Final HBL Status],
	'Report'[Final Destination],
	'Report'[Empty Container Return Status],
	'Report'[DPW Arrival Notice Status],
	'Report'[DO Status],
	'Report'[Custom's Filing Status],
	'Report'[CSO Member],
	'Report'[Created By],
	'Report'[Comments],
	'Report'[Actioned By],
	'Report'[Actioned],
	'Report'[Custom's Filing Date],
	'Report'[DPW Arrival Notice Date and Time],
	'Report'[DPW DO Release Date],
	'Report'[Empty Container Return Date],
	'Report'[ETA],
	'Report'[ETA at Final Destination],
	'Report'[ETD],
	'Report'[Final HBL Release Date],
	'Report'[Final MBL Release Date],
	'Report'[First HBL Draft Sent Data & Time],
	'Report'[HBL Amendment Date & Time],
	'Report'[LFD to Empty Return],
	'Report'[LFD to Pick Up],
	'Report'[Picked Up Date],
	'Report'[Port Cut-off Date & Time],
	'Report'[Pre-Alert Acceptance Date],
	'Report'[Pre-Alert Sent Date & Time],
	'Report'[VGM Submitted Date & time],
	'Report'[VGM Received Date & Time],
	'Report'[VGM Cut-off Date & Time],
	'Report'[SI Cut-off Date & Time],
	'Report'[SI Instructions Received Data & Time],
	'Report'[SI Submitted Date & Time]

select.Final MBL Release Date: @if(empty(item()?['Report[Final MBL Release Date]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[Final MBL Release Date]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy'))
select.Final HBL Release Date: @if(empty(item()?['Report[Final HBL Release Date]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[Final HBL Release Date]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy'))
select.First HBL Draft Sent Data & Time: @if(empty(item()?['Report[First HBL Draft Sent Data & Time]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[First HBL Draft Sent Data & Time]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'))
select.HBL Amendment Date & Time: @if(empty(item()?['Report[HBL Amendment Date & Time]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[HBL Amendment Date & Time]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'))
select.ETA at Final Destination: @if(empty(item()?['Report[ETA at Final Destination]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[ETA at Final Destination]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy'))
select.Carrier DO Release Date: @if(empty(item()?['Report[Carrier DO Release Date]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[Carrier DO Release Date]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy'))
select.Carrier Arrival Notice Received Date: @if(empty(item()?['Report[Carrier Arrival Notice Received Date]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[Carrier Arrival Notice Received Date]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy'))
select.DPW DO Release Date: @if(empty(item()?['Report[DPW DO Release Date]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[DPW DO Release Date]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy'))
select.DPW Arrival Notice Date and Time: @if(empty(item()?['Report[DPW Arrival Notice Date and Time]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[DPW Arrival Notice Date and Time]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'))
select.SI Cut-off Date & Time: @if(empty(item()?['Report[SI Cut-off Date & Time]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[SI Cut-off Date & Time]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'))
select.SI Instructions Received Data & Time: @if(empty(item()?['Report[SI Instructions Received Data & Time]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[SI Instructions Received Data & Time]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'))
select.SI Submitted Date & Time: @if(empty(item()?['Report[SI Submitted Date & Time]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[SI Submitted Date & Time]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'))
select.VGM Submitted Date & time: @if(empty(item()?['Report[VGM Submitted Date & time]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[VGM Submitted Date & time]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'))
select.VGM Received Date & Time: @if(empty(item()?['Report[VGM Received Date & Time]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[VGM Received Date & Time]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'))
select.VGM Cut-off Date & Time: @if(empty(item()?['Report[VGM Cut-off Date & Time]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[VGM Cut-off Date & Time]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'))
select.Pre-Alert Sent Date & Time: @if(empty(item()?['Report[Pre-Alert Sent Date & Time]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[Pre-Alert Sent Date & Time]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'))
select.Port Cut-off Date & Time: @if(empty(item()?['Report[Port Cut-off Date & Time]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[Port Cut-off Date & Time]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy HH:mm'))
select.Empty Container Return Date: @if(empty(item()?['Report[Empty Container Return Date]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[Empty Container Return Date]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy'))
select.LFD to Empty Return: @if(empty(item()?['Report[LFD to Empty Return]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[LFD to Empty Return]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy'))
select.LFD to Pick Up: @if(empty(item()?['Report[LFD to Pick Up]']), '', formatDateTime(item()?['Report[LFD to Pick Up]'], 'dd-MM-yyyy'))
